zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Fastolfe於1403年出生在英國林可爾史爾康寧斯比時，她的父親John Fastolf34歲，母親Alice de Avenel24歲。她於1422年與Edmund Wychingham在英國諾福爾可武德利辛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1475年在英國諾福爾可諾維其享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Fastolfe于1403年出生在英国林可爾史爾康寧斯比时，她的父亲John Fastolf34岁，母亲Alice de Avenel24岁。她于1422年与Edmund Wychingham在英国諾福爾可武德利辛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1475年在英国諾福爾可諾維其享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Fastolfe was born in 1403, in Coningsby, Lincolnshire, England, her father, John Fastolf, was 34 and her mother, Alice de Avenel, was 24. She married Edmund Wychingham in 1422, in Woodrising, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1475, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Fastolfe est née en 1403, à Coningsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John Fastolf, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alice de Avenel, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Wychingham en 1422, à Woodrising, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1475, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Fastolfe 1403 in Coningsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Fastolf 34 und ihre Mutter Alice de Avenel 24. Sie hat 1422 in Woodrising, Norfolk, England Edmund Wychingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1475 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Norwich, Norfolk, England.

Lei sposato Edmund Wychingham nel 1422, nel Woodrising, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1475, nel Norwich, Norfolk, England, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Fastolfeが1403年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアコニングスビーで生まれた時，父John Fastolfは34歳，母Alice de Avenelは24歳であった。1422年にイギリスノーフォルクウッドリシングでEdmund Wychinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1475年にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで72歳で死去した。

ko.Placé, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 플라ce
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Fastolfe(이)가 1403년 영국 링코실르 코닝스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Fastolf(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Avenel(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1422년 영국 노르폴크 우드리징에서 Edmund Wychingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1475년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Fastolfe nasceu em 1403, em Coningsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Fastolf, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Avenel, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Wychingham em 1422, em Woodrising, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1475, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 72 anos.

ru.Placé, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: плакe, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Fastolfe родилась в 1403 г. в местности конингсби, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Fastolf было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Avenel, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Wychingham в 1422 г. в местности вудрисинг, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1475 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Fastolfe nació en 1403, en Coningsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Fastolf, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Alice de Avenel, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Edmund Wychingham en 1422, en Woodrising, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1475, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años.
